title: Hello World
description:
Write a program that prints "Hello, World!"

Input Format:
No input required.

title: Print Input
description:
Read a line of input and print it back.

Input Format:
First line: a string to echo
constraints: Input is a single line string

testCases.input: a b c d e f g
testCases.expectedOutput: a b c d e f g

title: Sum of Two Numbers
description:
Given two integers a and b, return their sum.

Input Format:
First line: integer a
Second line: integer b

title: Two Sum
description:
Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

Input Format:
First line: integer n (size of array)
Second line: n space-separated integers
Third line: target integer

title: Reverse String
description:
Given a string, print it in reverse.

Input Format:
First line: a string containing alphanumeric characters.

examples.explanation: The reverse of hello is olleh.

title: Palindrome Check
description:
Given a string, check if it is a palindrome. Print 'true' if it is, 'false' otherwise.

Input Format:
First line: a string.

title: Find Maximum
description:
Given an array of integers, find the maximum element.

Input Format:
First line: integer n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Factorial
description:
Given a non-negative integer n, print its factorial.

Input Format:
First line: integer n

title: Binary Search
description:
Given an array of integers nums which is sorted in ascending order, and an integer target, write a function to search target in nums. If target exists, return its index. Otherwise, return -1.

Input Format:
First line: integer n (size of array)
Second line: n space-separated sorted integers
Third line: target integer

examples.explanation: 9 exists in nums and its index is 4

constraints: All the integers in nums are unique.

title: Valid Parentheses
description:
Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.

Input Format:
First line: string s

title: Rotate Array
description:
Given an integer array nums, rotate the array to the right by k steps, where k is non-negative.

Input Format:
First line: integer n
Second line: n space-separated integers
Third line: integer k

title: Maximum Subarray
description:
Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum, and return its sum.

Input Format:
First line: integer n
Second line: n space-separated integers

examples.explanation: The subarray [4,-1,2,1] has the largest sum 6.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description:
Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

Input Format:
First line: string s

examples.explanation: The answer is 'abc', with the length of 3.

constraints: s consists of English letters, digits, symbols and spaces.

title: Merge K Sorted Lists
description:
You are given an array of k linked-lists lists, each linked-list is sorted in ascending order. Merge all the linked-lists into one sorted linked-list and return it. (Input uses arrays to represent lists)

Input Format:
First line: integer k (number of lists)
Next k lines: The first integer is the size of the list, followed by the space-separated elements.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description:
Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

Input Format:
First line: integer n
Second line: n space-separated integers representing the elevation map.

examples.explanation: 6 units of rain water are trapped.

title: Sliding Window Maximum
description:
You are given an array of integers nums, there is a sliding window of size k which is moving from the very left of the array to the very right. You can only see the k numbers in the window. Each time the sliding window moves right by one position. Return the max sliding window.

Input Format:
First line: integer n
Second line: n space-separated integers
Third line: integer k

title: Find Twice
description: Given an integer n, print 2 * n.

title: Valid Anagram
description:
Given two strings s and t, return 'true' if t is an anagram of s, and 'false' otherwise.

Input Format:
First line: string s
Second line: string t

examples.explanation: nagaram is an anagram of anagram.

constraints: s and t consist of lowercase English letters.

title: Fibonacci Number
description:
The Fibonacci numbers, commonly denoted F(n) form a sequence, called the Fibonacci sequence, such that each number is the sum of the two preceding ones, starting from 0 and 1. Given n, calculate F(n).

Input Format:
First line: integer n
